meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer AI Workflow: Scale Beyond Basic Apps (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use this intermediate workflow featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end, scalable client projects faster.
content.answer_block: To escape the 'basic app' trap, move from manual coding to an AI-augmented architecture. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you standardize your output, reduce technical debt, and transform from a code-monkey into a high-leverage software architect delivering production-grade solutions for premium clients.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a half-finished CRUD app, wondering why your client projects feel like glorified prototypes rather than robust software. The gap between a freelancer and a high-ticket consultant isn't just code quality—it's the systematic ability to ship complex features at velocity without burning out.

It’s time to stop fighting the framework and start commanding the architecture. By shifting your workflow to include intelligent scaffolding and autonomous CLI-based development, you turn every project into a repeatable, scalable asset. This is the blueprint for moving from 'basic' to 'architect-level' delivery.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure and type-safe foundation before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust, scalable project architecture for a SaaS application using Next.js, TypeScript, and Prisma. Include folders for services, types, hooks, and tests.

steps.title: Database Schema Synthesis
steps.description: Generate a relational schema that accounts for multi-tenancy and audit logs from the start to prevent future refactoring headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS. Include tables for Organizations, Users, Roles, and AuditLogs with appropriate indexing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema and migration files'

steps.title: Component Logic Injection
steps.description: Use AI to write modular, reusable UI components that adhere to strict design systems, ensuring your frontend is as professional as your backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a reusable data-table component with server-side filtering, sorting, and pagination using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI primitives.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'create a data-table component in components/ui/data-table.tsx'

steps.title: Autonomous Test Suites
steps.description: Automate your QA by generating unit and integration tests for every new feature, ensuring your client never sees a regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Vitest integration tests for the authentication service, covering edge cases like session expiry and unauthorized access.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for services/auth.ts'

steps.title: Performance Optimization
steps.description: Run an architectural audit via AI to identify bottlenecks in query execution and bundle size before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks. Suggest improvements for database query optimization and bundle size reduction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'audit the codebase for performance and security improvements'

pro_tips: Always define a 'System Prompt' file in your root directory so Claude Code knows your preferred coding style and library choices.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation as you code, not after; it forces you to clarify your logic before committing.
Never merge AI-generated code without running a local 'lint' and 'type-check' suite first to catch hallucinated imports.
Treat your database migrations as immutable artifacts; use Claude Code to verify that new migrations don't break existing production data.
Automate your feedback loop by linking your Git commit messages to your project management tickets via CLI hooks.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's folder structure against the scaffolding step, then automate your testing suite to ensure long-term stability.
content.conversion_block: Stop building basic apps and start scaling your freelance career with professional-grade AI workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
